rejected.postText:
Hiring: Cloud / Platform Engineer (5–9 Years) | Gurugram | Hybrid

We are looking for a hands-on Cloud / Platform Engineer who has built and scaled cloud-native systems to 100K+ users.

This is NOT just an infra role — we need someone with a strong backend + distributed systems mindset and a product-thinking approach who cares about performance, reliability, cost, and user impact.

🔹 Location: Gurugram (Hybrid)
🔹 Interview Mode: Virtual
🔹 Experience: 5–9 Years

🔧 Key Responsibilities:
Architect & scale cloud-native systems on AWS (preferred) / GCP / Azure
Build high-throughput backend services using Node.js / Python
Design distributed systems (event-driven architecture, queues, caching, async workers)
Implement autoscaling, HA, DR & performance optimization
Infrastructure as Code using Terraform
Work with Docker & Kubernetes (EKS/ECS)
Setup observability (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)
Optimize cloud cost (FinOps)
Collaborate closely with Product & Engineering teams

✅ What We’re Looking For:
5–9 years of backend/cloud engineering experience
Experience scaling systems to 100K–1M+ users / high RPS environments
Strong AWS exposure (EKS/ECS, Lambda, RDS/DynamoDB, SQS/Kafka, Redis, CDN)
Deep understanding of distributed systems (concurrency, idempotency, retries, eventual consistency)
Hands-on with CI/CD pipelines & containerization
Strong ownership mindset & ability to communicate technical trade-offs
Product-focused engineering mindset

📩 Interested candidates can share their resume at: kabir.chauhan@esscorptech.com

Happy Friday!

At Konrad, we’re at that exciting stage where we are building our Gurugram engineering culture.

If you’re a Node, Next.js, or React/React Native developer (5-9 years experience) who’s still as curious today as you were on day one, I want to hear from you.

What we’re actually doing here:
Radical Collaboration: We’re looking for people who enjoy a whiteboard session more than a solo coding marathon.
The Mentorship Loop: We are also looking for folks who are excited to share their technical experiences to level up the folks around you (and stay sharp yourself)

We’re right on Golf Course Road, and the vibe is all about collective growth. 

Just send your resume to sthyagarajan@konrad.com and let’s see if we’re a fit.
Have a great weekend, everyone. ✌️

Job description and application link for reference: https://lnkd.in/gq6fsx8J

PS: We are currently looking to hire in-house, and not looking for vendor assistance! If this changes, I will leave a post about it.

🚀 We’re Hiring: Software Engineer (Backend) | Gurugram Sec- 44(WFO)
We are building a full-stack AI Marketing Platform that is redefining how brands and agencies optimize their advertising campaigns. Our mission is to empower marketers with data-driven creativity, helping them understand what works, why it works, and how to make every ad perform better.
By combining AI, analytics, and automation, we decode creative performance and deliver actionable insights that drive real business impact.
🧠 Role: Software Engineer
📍 Location: Gurugram (Work from Office)
 💼 Experience: 3+ Years
 🕒 Type: Full-time
🔧 What You’ll Work On
• Build and integrate APIs from major ad platforms (Meta, Google Ads, YouTube, etc.) for campaign data ingestion
 • Design and scale backend systems using Python / Node.js
 • Work on data ingestion, transformation, and management to power AI-driven insights
 • Optimize databases and backend pipelines for performance and scalability
 • Implement testing, monitoring, and CI/CD best practices
 • Collaborate with product, design, and AI/ML teams to ship high-impact features
✅ What We’re Looking For
• 3+ years of backend or full-stack development experience
 • Strong proficiency in Python, Node.js, or both
 • Experience with REST APIs, GraphQL, and third-party integrations
 • Hands-on with PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or similar databases
 • Familiarity with AWS / GCP / Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
 • Understanding of LLMs and Agentic systems is a plus
 • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
⭐ Bonus
• Exposure to AI/ML, data engineering, or Ad-Tech ecosystems
 • Knowledge of creative analytics or marketing attribution
🌟 Why Join?
• Opportunity to work at the intersection of AI, data, and marketing technology
 • Fast-moving startup environment with high ownership
 • Collaborative culture where every idea matters
 • Build products that help global brands optimize creative performance

If this opportunity aligns with your experience or someone in your network, please share your resume at mukul@prompthire.ai or feel free to reach out directly.

rejected.postText:
Job Title: NodeJS Developer - 3 positions
Job Company: Intellect Capital Group
Location: India

Job Description:
Intellect Capital Group is immediately hiring 3 experienced NodeJS Developers to strengthen their backend development capabilities. This role is crucial for developing robust, high-performance, and scalable server-side applications and services. Candidates must possess 7-10 years of relevant professional experience, ensuring they can handle complex system architecture and deliver reliable solutions under stringent deadlines. The positions are located in the major tech hubs of Chennai and Gurugram, and local candidates are strongly encouraged to apply.

The successful hire will work closely with frontend and DevOps teams to define system requirements, design architecture, and implement high-quality code. Focus areas include optimizing application performance, ensuring security, and contributing to overall technical innovation within the team.

Job Requirements:
• 7-10 years of professional experience as a dedicated NodeJS Developer.
• Deep expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and the Node.js runtime environment.
• Proven experience building and consuming robust RESTful APIs and microservices.
• Advanced knowledge of performance tuning and optimization for backend systems.
• Proficiency with asynchronous programming paradigms and event-driven architecture.
• Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases, including schema design and query optimization.
• Familiarity with cloud platforms and deployment strategies for high-availability applications.
• Strong debugging and advanced troubleshooting skills for production environments.
• Ability to mentor junior developers and enforce coding standards.
• Must be a local profile or willing to relocate immediately to Chennai or Gurugram.

Interested Experts Should Apply Through: https://lnkd.in/dkZctAWT

If not interested, please comment #CFBR to help this post reach more people.
